subject: [BUG] fuse: KASAN null-ptr-deref in fuse_readpages_end after aborted splice read reply

reviews.author: 김민서
reviews.summary: reviewer confirmed that the two-patch series fixes their reproducer and did not observe any KASAN/Oops/panic in the recorded runs, indicating that the issue is resolved
reviews.raw_body:
Hi Joanne,

Thank you for the pointer, and sorry for the duplicate report.

I applied the two-patch series starting at [1] on top of my v7.1-rc7 tree
and rebuilt the kernel with the same KASAN config.

Before applying the patches, the C reproducer triggered:

  KASAN: null-ptr-deref in range [0x0000000000000000-0x0000000000000007]
  RIP: fuse_readpages_end+0xe5/0x650

With the patched kernel, I reran the same C reproducer as uid 1000 with a
user namespace. I did not observe KASAN/Oops/panic in the recorded runs.

Based on my testing, the patch series appears to fix my reproducer.

Thank you for taking the time to check this.

Best regards,
Minseo Kim

2026년 6월 10일 (수) 오전 6:40, Joanne Koong <joannelkoong@gmail.com>님이 작성:

2026-06-10.patch_summary: This patch is not a new solution to the problem, but rather a reference to an existing patch that supposedly fixes the issue of a null-pointer dereference in fuse_readpages_end after an aborted splice read reply.

2026-06-09.patch_summary: This patch is not a new solution to the problem, but rather a reference to an existing patch that supposedly fixes the issue of a null-pointer dereference in fuse_readpages_end after an aborted splice read reply.
